jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at FoodWorld
jsonLd.description:
FoodWorld is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About FoodWorld:
FoodWorld is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FoodWorld!
